Text.Page:
Blasted gulas! They dumped carrion in all the underground springs. They're all poisoned.

Gulas can digest anything—they could drink from a latrine. I was worried they'd starve us out, but—they're slavers. What do the slaves drink?

There has to be a {@LinkCreature:208#1038#clean well} somewhere in the Cavern of Shackles! Take this jug and find it.

(A cool, fresh breeze blows from the deep, dark well.)

(Further down, water gurgles in an underground stream.)

I knew it. Where's my cup?

Aaaah!

I'd forgotten that fresh water smelled so good!
